message:
Add reservation expiry-driven refresh to TUI poller

Add reservation_state_requires_time_refresh() to force DB re-query when
active reservations reach their expiry timestamp, even if PRAGMA
data_version hasn't changed. This ensures the TUI shows accurate
reservation counts as reservations expire.

Includes two tests: one for expiry-based refresh triggering, one for
missing snapshot row fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
